enum_values.name: MODEL_DEFAULT
enum_values.summary: The member axis is defined individually based on each part's properties.

enum_values.name: REFERENCE_AXIS_ECCENTRICITY_BY_NEUTRAL_AXIS
enum_values.summary: The reference axis is the member axis. The location of the neutral axis defines the axis eccentricity.

enum_values.name: REFERENCE_AXIS
enum_values.summary: The reference axis is the member axis.

enum_values.name: NEUTRAL_AXIS
enum_values.summary: The neutral axis is the member axis.
